protocol.name: wlmaker_pointer_tracking_v1

interface.name: zwlmaker_pointer_tracking_v1
interface.description: This interface permits surfaces to track the pointer posiiton relative to the provided surface.

request.name: track
request.description:
Creates a new tracker instance associated with the provided surface.
The seat associated with the surface must have (or had) WL_SEAT_CAPABILITY_POINTER capabilitiey. Otherwise, WL_DISPLAY_ERROR_INVALID_METHOD is raised.

interface.name: zwlmaker_pointer_tracker_v1
interface.description:
Reports the pointer's position relative to the provided surface.
The position is reported also beyond the surface's area, and also when the surface does not have pointer focus. If the surface is mapped more than once, the compositor may report the position relative to each mapped instance of the surface.

event.name: position
event.description:
Reports the current pointer positoin relative to the surface.
The position is reported relative to the surface's edge vectors, and irrespective of whether the surface has pointer focus or whether the pointer is in- our outside of the surface area.
Positions within the surface will report values in the interval [0, 1) for both relative_x and relative_y.
